title: OPERATOR EXPECTATION: triage synthesizes ACROSS backlog items — detect shared root cause, deep-think an architecture-first plan, and commit ONE unified general solution (clean code, design patterns, SSOT) that closes N items, instead of N independent patches
why: OPERATOR PRIORITIZATION 2026-07-21: token-optimization class bumped by directive ('prioritize and bump token optimization related tasks'). OPERATOR DIRECTIVE 2026-07-21: 'topn triage should be smart enough to pick multiple tasks and build a thoroughly deep-think plan and build the unified solution based on clean code, design patterns, best practice to deliver a GENERAL solution.' Today triage selects items independently (top_n avg ~1.5) and inboxbatch groups only MECHANICALLY (same class/files); no phase performs root-cause synthesis across the backlog. The canonical retro (campaign_retrospective_215_231: 12 defects = ONE disease, replicated beliefs) proved symptoms cluster; the standing rules no_workaround_root_cause_redesign + never_duplicate_centralize_via_design_patterns + architecture_first_design demand per-disease cures. The ingredients ALL exist unwired: inboxbatch classes, plan-review multi-lens gate (CEO/Eng/Design/Security), buildplanner phase, strategy=ultrathink, ADR-0054 campaign runner (dependency-ordered multi-cycle waves).
how_to_apply: Wire the synthesis seam, config-first: (1) TRIAGE gains a synthesis step — over the inboxbatch-classified backlog it MAY emit a unified-solution commitment {root_cause_hypothesis, member_items[], shared_seam (package/interface), design_requirements} instead of independent top_n entries; evidence-cited, not vibes (each member must name the shared root cause it instantiates). (2) PLANNING gets teeth: a unified commitment routes through buildplanner+plan-review at deep tier (opus-class + fable overlay per pipeline-first rule); plan-review verdict REVISE/ABORT if the design is a patch-bundle rather than a general abstraction (single-source-with-projection, Strategy/DI over flags, immutability, KISS floor). (3) EXECUTION: small unified fix = one cycle; large = emit an ADR-0054 campaign plan (dependency waves) — both already-existing paths. (4) ACCEPTANCE: the ONE solution must satisfy EVERY member item's ACs (per-member predicates stay separate in ACS — no blended green); members close TRANSACTIONALLY with landing (forensics rule: item-consumption transactional with landing). (5) Guard: synthesis must fail-open to independent top_n when no credible shared root cause exists — forced unification of unrelated items is the failure mode to pin against (a test: heterogeneous backlog => independent commitments). Measure: items-closed-per-cycle and wrapper-amortization via token telemetry.
evidence: Operator directive 2026-07-21; triage-decision.json top_n sizes 974-981 (avg ~1.5); knowledge-base/research/token-usage-history-2026-07-20.md (7.6M/cycle wrapper); campaign_retrospective_215_231 (12-defects-one-disease); ADR-0054 campaign runner; plan-review + buildplanner personas present in phase catalog.
notes: [MERGE 2026-07-23] Absorbs triage-batch-density-homogeneous-small-items as the degenerate/fallback path: when no unifying design exists, commit the homogeneous small-item group as one cycle.
